guidance.wrapperRole: Ecuador Connecticut wrapper sets top-note, color, and burn for this vitola.
guidance.binderRole: Honduras binder supports structure and integration with the filler.
guidance.fillerRole: Honduras / Nicaragua filler drives body, strength, and the flavor arc Sterlon should echo.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants ultra-premium collector rarity or maximum strength regardless of price.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend for value seekers, humidor fillers, or 'something good under $7' requests - cite CA 2024 Best Buy list.
